extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table with separate against-versus-by rows is provided in the supplied risk section. The narrative discloses one indirect-tax matter against the Company for ₹11.88 million, which is counted for the Company-and-subsidiaries aggregate and tax category; the separate ₹16.83 million indirect-tax matter against a Director is excluded, and no criminal matter or “By” matter is disclosed. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated Total of ₹289.64 million as of December 31, 2021, rather than a re-summed amount. The company-wide top-10 customer concentration is 37.49% for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, calculated as a percentage of total sales; no company-wide top-5 percentage is disclosed. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹11.88 million = ₹1.188 crore and ₹289.64 million = ₹28.964 crore.
